package.name: amr_3d_mapping
package.description:
RTAB-Map 3D SLAM integration untuk Mobile Robot Ackermann Indoor Platform.
Pipeline (mode SYNC): RealSense D455 (RGB + Depth) + RPLIDAR C1 (scan) + wheel odometry -> ApproximateTimeSynchronizer (slop 0.05 s) -> RTAB-Map rgbd_sync -> rtabmap_slam -> peta 3D point cloud + database .db -> visualisasi Foxglove 3D panel
Mode operasi: - mapping : bangun peta 3D baru dari nol - localization : load peta existing, robot tracking di peta tersebut
Diintegrasikan ke amr_full.launch.py via flag use_rtabmap:=true.
